title: The Craften Files: A Walten Files Mod
description: Everything Walten Files, but in Minecraft!
body:
You read the title, a minecraft mod, a cool one at that, about 'The Walten Files'

It adds fan favorites like Bon, Sha, Boozoo and... the tiger statue? The Sha Burger? I'm sure that paints quite a picture, but practically EVERYTHING from Bon's is here for your building pleasure, yes even that one clock from that one shot that appeared for 2 seconds! Alongside many-a custom stuff such as arcades and plushies! 

 ~Enjoy it while it lasts!

                                              REQUIRES GECKOLIB
                                              Credits:
LeBlédard & Uganith for coding
TooMuchEggNog for animations
Bendu for doors
Paloonie & Five Nights at PEAK for beta testing
&
To All for playing
